creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194841
py-jaraco.functools-1.19.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates devel/py-jaraco.functools to 1.19 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/jaraco/jaraco.functools/compare/1.8.1...1.19

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- changed RUN_DEPENDS/BUILD_DEPENDS to match the new dependencies
- changed WWW

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
